title: Bartoline Boiled Linseed Oil 250ml – Fast-Drying Wood Protector for Softwood Garden Furniture & Interior Wood (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ENHANCES & PROTECTS WOOD: Deeply nourishes softwood surfaces, preventing drying, cracking, and sun damage while providing a rich, natural sheen.
FAST-DRYING FORMULA: Contains special additives to speed up the drying process, making it ideal for quick and efficient wood treatment.
PERFECT FOR GARDEN & INTERIOR USE: Designed for softwood garden furniture, doors, and wooden surfaces, keeping them resilient against weathering and wear.
EASY TO APPLY & ABSORBENT: Simply apply with a clean cloth or brush, rubbing in well. For the best protection, apply 2-3 coats with 24-hour drying intervals.
SAFE HANDLING & CLEANUP: Dispose of application cloths responsibly to prevent fire hazards. Clean tools with Bartoline White Spirit for easy maintenance.
